core/db.py: Added init_db() try/except wrapper to create partial unique index idx_trades_one_open_per_slug on trades(market_slug) where status='open'.
Added info log on successful index ensure and warning log on failure.
Changed insert_open_trade return type to int | None.
Made insert_open_trade atomic with BEGIN IMMEDIATE, open-slug pre-check SELECT, and sqlite3.IntegrityError handling returning None.
Preserved existing INSERT columns including source.
bot_core.py: Native open loop now checks insert_open_trade(...) result; on None logs OPEN SKIPPED (duplicate slug) and continues.
Model bridge open section now checks insert_open_trade(...) result; on None logs BRIDGE OPEN SKIPPED (duplicate slug) and continues.
